title: BCI (Best Client-side Improvements)
description: A collection of the best and most useful mods that can improve performance, comfort and a little bit visual component.
body:
BCI (Best Client-side Improvements) is a mod pack that I created to maximize the gaming experience and improve the game in many aspects.
  

This mod pack contains mods that are divided into three categories:

Optimizers: These mods improve game performance and stability, such as Sodium, Starlight, iris, FerriteCore, Farsight, Fastload, FPS Reducer, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, Enhanced Block Entities, Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast, Indium, Krypton, LazyDFU, Lithium, MemoryLeakFix, Smooth Boot, etc.


Useful: These mods add features and functions that make the game more convenient and enjoyable, as well as fixing bugs: AutoModpack, Accurate Block Placement, AppleSkin, Autofish, Automatic Doors, AutoRun, AutoSwitch, Better Third Person, BetterF3, Bridging Mod, Chest Tracker, Connectivity, Controlling, Equipment Compare, Enchantment Descriptions, EssentialGUI, Fabrishot, Inventory Profiles Next, Inventory TabsJourneyMap, Mod Menu, Replay Mod, ShulkerBoxTooltip, Stack Refill, Tool Stats, ToolTipFix, VTDownloader, etc.


Cosmetic: These mods change the look and sound of the game, such as AmbientSounds 5, Collective, Model Gap Fix, NoFog, Not Enough Animations, Presence Footsteps, Simple Discord RPC, SkinRestorer, Smooth Swapping, Sound Physics, Visuality.


All of the mods in this package are compatible with each other and work in both single-player and multiplayer. You can customize the list of mods to your liking by adding or removing them as you see fit.

I hope you enjoy this mod pack and have fun playing with it. If you encounter any problems or have any suggestions, please leave a comment on the project page. Thanks for downloading BCM (Best Clientside Mods)!
